🏦 PPF Calculator

Template-Driven Form (ngModel)
PPF deposit limit: ₹500 – ₹1,50,000 per financial year
PPF has a lock-in of 15 years, extendable in blocks of 5 years
Enter your current PPF balance if you already have an account
7.1%per annum (compounded annually)

Enter your details

Fill in the form and click Calculate to see your PPF maturity projection
